//exclude: Underscore-prefixed files are local scratch/experiments (see .gitignore) — never part of the build. Tests are excluded from dist: they're run via vitest straight from src/ (unaffected by this), and one test helper (src/tests/fixtures/load-fixtures.ts) uses Node's fs/path/url, which has no business in the published, zero-I/O, browser-portable core (ADR-0001, ADR-0008).
//exclude-seed: standard-set-seed.json is authoring-time input for the refresh script (read via fs), not a runtime import — keep it out of the compiled/shipped output. standard-set.json (the resolved data the wrapper imports) is deliberately NOT excluded, so tsc emits it into dist for the ./data/standard-set subpath export (ADR-0019).
